titleStmt.title: SII 41.42: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 42. (A.R. No. 41 of 1905.) Perumukkal, Tiṇḍivaṉam Taluk, South Arcot District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Mukhyāchalēśvara temple on the hill.

summary.p: Gift of land measuring 500 kuḻi as measured by 12-foot rod, to the temple of Tiruvānmikaiīśvaram-uḍaiyār at Perumukkil alias Gaṅgaikoṇḍachōḻa-nallūr, as endowment for lamp service (tiruviḷakkuppuṟam) by one Tiraiyan Mādēvaḍikaḷ Gaṅgaikoṇḍāṉ alias Rājādhirāja-vaḷavataraiyaṉ of Cheyyūr alias Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-nallūr in Puṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Chembūr-kōṭṭam. The land was purchased by the donor from the ūrār of Perumukkil in public auction.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvana cakravattikaḷ śrīvikramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 9 Oṉpatāvatu
[ja]yaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu Oymāṉāṭāṉa vijaiyarājentravaḷanāṭ
ṭu perumukkilāṉa kaṅkaikoṇṭāṉallūr Ūrom Eṅkaḷur nirnilattil naṭuviṟ
tūmpiṉiṉṟun teṟku nokkippoṉa vāykkālukku meṟkut taṭiyiraṇṭu nikki
Itaṉ melvarampukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ērippaṭṭi vaṭavāykkā
lukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Attimeṭṭu peruvarampukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ
kellai Atticceṟu vaṭavarampukku teṟkum Innāṟperellaiyuḷḷum Uṭpaṭṭa ni
lam paṉṉiraṭik kolāl kuḻi 5 100 Ainūṟum viṟṟuttarak koḷvārillaiyove
ṉṟu kūṟa Immoḻi keṭṭu Etirmoḻi kuṭutton Immaṇṭalattuc cempūrk koṭ
ṭattu puṟaiyūr nāṭṭucceyyūrāna jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻanallūrt tiraiyanmāte
vaṭikaḷ kaṅkaikoṇṭāṉāna Irājātirāja vaḷavataraiyaneṉnāniṟo niṅka
ḷ muṟcollappaṭṭa nirnilam viṟṟuttarak koṇṭu perumukkilāna kaṅkai
koṇṭanallūrt tirumalaimel tiruvānmikai Īśvaramuṭaiyārkku tirunu
n=tāviḷakkup puṟamākak koṇṭu viṭuvenānkoḷveṉ muṟkūṟiya perumukki
lāna kaṅkaikoṇṭānallūr Ūrom Emmil Icaintavilaipporuḷ Aṉ
ṟāṭu naṟkācu Aiñcu Ikkācu Aiñcu Āvaṇakkaḷiye kiḻikaiccelak koṇṭu piṟkūṟiya
tiraiyanmātevaṭikaḷ kaṅkaikoṇṭānāna rājātirāja vaḷavataraiyanukku
viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Innilattāl van=taiṟaimuṟai Ep
pe(r)ṟpaṭṭatum nāṅkaḷe pokkaṟukkak kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi Few letters lost in the end.
Digital edition of SII 41.42 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
